purpose: Hand applying beauty product to face area (face not visible). Tactile, intimate.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Intimate beauty photography of elegant {gender_specific} hand mid-application of {product_descriptor} to neck or wrist area (face not visible, frame ends at chin), soft directional window light from left, real visible skin texture, fingertip caught mid-touch, shot on 100mm macro at f/4, no text, no watermark, no face visible {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T20. Saudi adaptation guidance: Application gesture must be modest — neck, wrist, back of hand only. NOT collarbone, chest, or other framings reading immodest. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
